title: Lekesky Fluffy Double Duvet Set, Winter Fluffy Bedding Double，Soft Warm Teddy Fleece Duvet Set 3pcs (1x Shaggy Duvet Cover + 2x Pillowcases), Beige
features: COZY SOFT AND WARM TO TOUCH - Lekesky fleece duvet cover set is made of superb soft and warm faux fur SHAGGY long pile fabric, stay in bed with this fluffy bedding double, keep soft and warm in colder months, while enjoy the fluffy comfort just like be in the clouds

PRETTY BEIGE COLOR - Vibrant beige color on Lekesky teddy fleece bedding, perfectly decor bedroom with beautiful colors, makes your bedding more aesthetic, faux rabbit fur fleece fabric bedding set have a fuzzy soft warm feel to touch, helps u sleep well with decent warm and not too hot

CONCEALED ZIP CLOSURE - Durable zip fastening instead of buttons which makes the life easier. 4 corner ties inside should keep the duvets still and no sliping off the bed. Warm ideal for cold weather and winter, which keeps u comfortable and warm all day on the bed

EASY CARE - Our shaggy faux rabbit fur duvet cover is low-maintenance and remains soft and shiny wash after many washes. Machine wash separately in cold water with similar colors on a gentle cycle. For the fluffiest feel, tumble dry at a low temperature (below 40°C) or air dry. Avoid bleach and ironing

PACKAGE INCLUDED - 1x fluffy duvet cover 200x200 cm, 2x matching colored envelop pillowcases. NOTE: duvets or pillow inserts not included in. Packed with exquisite customized bag, ship fast, lekesky fleece duvet set should be best Christmas gifts for family and friends, they would be delighted with this beige fleece bedding
